text: Who was the thief?
People are not so honest as
they once were.
The temptation to steal is greater than
ever before--especially in large shops.
zh: 任何时候都要大——尤其是在大商店里。
zh_hant: 任何時候都要大——尤其是在大商店裡。

text: A detective recently watched a well-dressed
zh: 一名侦探最近一直在留意一位穿着讲究的
zh_hant: 一名偵探最近一直在留意一位穿著講究的

text: woman who always went into a large store
on Monday mornings.
One Monday,
there were fewer people in the shop
than usual when the woman came in,
zh: 要少,那位女士正好进来,
zh_hant: 要少,那位女士正好進來,

text: so it was easier for the detective to watch her.
zh: 这样侦探观察她就更方便了。
zh_hant: 這樣偵探觀察她就更方便了。

text: The woman first bought a few small articles.
zh: 那位女士起初买了几件小东西。
zh_hant: 那位女士起初買了幾件小東西。

text: After a little time,
she chose one of the most expensive dresses
zh: 她挑选了店里最贵的一件
zh_hant: 她挑選了店裡最貴的一件

text: in the shop and handed it to an assistant
who wrapped it up for her as quickly as possible.
zh: 那店员尽快帮她把裙子包好。
zh_hant: 那店員儘快幫她把裙子包好。

text: Then the woman simply took the parcel
zh: 接着那位女士拿起包裹
zh_hant: 接著那位女士拿起包裹

text: and walked out of the shop without paying.
zh: 就直接走出商店,没有付钱。
zh_hant: 就直接走出商店,沒有付錢。

text: When she was arrested,
the detective found out that
the shop assistant was her daughter.
zh: 那名店员正是她的女儿。
zh_hant: 那名店員正是她的女兒。

text: The girl 'gave' her mother
a free dress once a week!
